creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update from Vic (basically, it's in the queue):
Larry,

I just spent 8 days in Florida at a conference I organized.
Consequently I have many, many follow-up tasks to complete.
I probably won't have time to work on lsof for some time,
perhaps not until next week.

Tell people I will work on it as soon as I can.

Vic
